title: capraria dulcis
intro: Capraria dulcis, also known as honesty or honeysuckle, is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region and other parts of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Capraria dulcis include relief from coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Capraria dulcis is often used as a dried herb, tea, or tincture, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in remedies for respiratory and digestive issues.
